it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.NotificationType

    Subclasses of TdApi.NotificationType in it.tdlight.jni
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    static class  TdApi.NotificationTypeNewCall
    New call was received.
    static class  TdApi.NotificationTypeNewMessage
    New message was received.
    static class  TdApi.NotificationTypeNewPushMessage
    New message was received through a push notification.
    static class  TdApi.NotificationTypeNewSecretChat
    New secret chat was created.
